cambridge-ielts-01.title: Cambridge IELTS 1
cambridge-ielts-01.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 1 Practice Tests. Features authentic examination papers from Cambridge ESOL, providing excellent preparation and practice for both Academic and General Training candidates.

cambridge-ielts-02.title: Cambridge IELTS 2
cambridge-ielts-02.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 2 Practice Tests. Contains four complete tests for Academic candidates plus extra Reading and Writing modules for General Training candidates. Includes a comprehensive key.

cambridge-ielts-03.title: Cambridge IELTS 3
cambridge-ielts-03.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 3 Practice Tests. Provides candidates with an excellent opportunity to familiarise themselves with IELTS and to practise examination techniques using authentic test material.

cambridge-ielts-04.title: Cambridge IELTS 4
cambridge-ielts-04.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 4 Practice Tests. Offers comprehensive preparation with four complete practice papers for Academic candidates, plus General Training Reading and Writing modules.

cambridge-ielts-05.title: Cambridge IELTS 5
cambridge-ielts-05.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 5 Practice Tests. Excellent examination practice with authentic papers, answer sheets, tapescripts, and clear explanations of the scoring system.

cambridge-ielts-06.title: Cambridge IELTS 6
cambridge-ielts-06.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 6 Practice Tests. Features four clean Academic practice exams plus General Training modules. Perfect resource for self-study and classroom use.

cambridge-ielts-07.title: Cambridge IELTS 7
cambridge-ielts-07.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 7 Practice Tests. Practice with test papers that mirror the actual exam format and level of difficulty. Includes answer keys and detailed audio transcripts.

cambridge-ielts-08.title: Cambridge IELTS 8
cambridge-ielts-08.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 8 Practice Tests. Fully authentic examination papers from Cambridge ESOL. An invaluable self-study pack containing the student book with answers and 2 audio CDs.

cambridge-ielts-09.title: Cambridge IELTS 9
cambridge-ielts-09.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 9 Practice Tests. Contains four complete tests for Academic candidates plus extra modules for General Training candidates. Includes audio access and answers.

cambridge-ielts-10.title: Cambridge IELTS 10
cambridge-ielts-10.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 10 Practice Tests. Provides excellent practice with four authentic test papers from Cambridge English Language Assessment. Invaluable self-study material.

cambridge-ielts-11.title: Cambridge IELTS 11
cambridge-ielts-11.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 11 Practice Tests. Includes four authentic exam papers for either Academic or General Training. Highly practical self-study guide with answers.

cambridge-ielts-12.title: Cambridge IELTS 12
cambridge-ielts-12.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 12 Practice Tests. Authentically structured tests matching the modern exam pattern. Highly recommended for candidates seeking 7.5+ band score.

cambridge-ielts-13.title: Cambridge IELTS 13
cambridge-ielts-13.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 13 Practice Tests. Offers comprehensive preparation with authentic papers, detailed answer explanations, and listening audios. Boosts confidence and performance.

cambridge-ielts-14.title: Cambridge IELTS 14
cambridge-ielts-14.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 14 Practice Tests. Clean, authentic exam papers containing IELTS listening transcripts, vocabulary banks, and expert tips on reading strategies.

cambridge-ielts-15.title: Cambridge IELTS 15
cambridge-ielts-15.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 15 Practice Tests. The definitive practice source for IELTS candidates. Reflects modern testing strategies with up-to-date topics.

cambridge-ielts-16.title: Cambridge IELTS 16
cambridge-ielts-16.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 16 Practice Tests. Authentic practice papers designed to help students maximize their performance. Includes speaking test videos and feedback notes.

cambridge-ielts-17.title: Cambridge IELTS 17
cambridge-ielts-17.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 17 Practice Tests. Contains four complete Academic exam papers with answers and access to audios. Excellent for tracking your preparation progress.

cambridge-ielts-18.title: Cambridge IELTS 18
cambridge-ielts-18.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 18 Practice Tests. Authentically formatted to match the latest Cambridge standards. Essential tool for identifying exam readiness and gaps.

cambridge-ielts-19.title: Cambridge IELTS 19
cambridge-ielts-19.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 19 Practice Tests. The most recent publication offering updated examination standards, rich test analysis, and highly targeted practice sessions.

cambridge-ielts-20.title: Cambridge IELTS 20
cambridge-ielts-20.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 20 Practice Tests. Pre-release practice tests compiling actual exam queries and standard listening audios to maximize candidate performance.

cambridge-ielts-21.title: Cambridge IELTS 21
cambridge-ielts-21.description: Official Cambridge IELTS 21 Practice Tests. Advance preparation module containing mock papers aligned with the latest curriculum changes and scoring revisions.

cambridge-english-first-handbook.title: Cambridge English First Handbook
cambridge-english-first-handbook.description: Official Cambridge English First Handbook. Contains helpful preparation guides, exam tips, and official guidelines for teachers and candidates.

essential-tests-for-ielts.title: Essential Tests for IELTS
essential-tests-for-ielts.description: Essential practice tests designed to help candidates prepare for the IELTS exam, featuring realistic test format and answer keys.

first-certificate-english-1-cambridge-re.title: First Certificate English 1 Cambridge Revised Exam (from 2015)
first-certificate-english-1-cambridge-re.description: Authentic examination papers from Cambridge English Language Assessment. Provides students with an excellent opportunity to familiarise themselves with the revised 2015 FCE exam.

ielts-speaking-part-1.title: IELTS Speaking Part 1
ielts-speaking-part-1.description: Comprehensive study material and sample questions with model answers for IELTS Speaking Part 1 to help you gain confidence.

ielts-speaking-sample-with-answers-1.title: IELTS Speaking Sample with Answers (Ver 1)
ielts-speaking-sample-with-answers-1.description: Authentic IELTS speaking practice tests and model answers to help you improve vocabulary, grammar, and fluency.

ielts-writing-sample-book-for-ac-and-gt.title: IELTS Writing Sample Book for AC and GT
ielts-writing-sample-book-for-ac-and-gt.description: Excellent sample answers and analysis for IELTS Academic and General Training Writing tasks, helping you achieve higher band scores.

ielts-writing-task-2-samples.title: IELTS Writing Task 2 Samples
ielts-writing-task-2-samples.description: A comprehensive collection of IELTS Writing Task 2 essays, model answers, and examiner commentary to boost your essay writing skills.

ielts-guide-for-teachers.title: IELTS Guide for Teachers
ielts-guide-for-teachers.description: An official guide for English teachers offering tips, classroom ideas, and evaluation standards to effectively prepare students for the IELTS exam.

ielts-speaking-sample-with-answers-2.title: IELTS Speaking Sample with Answers (Ver 2)
ielts-speaking-sample-with-answers-2.description: Another set of authentic IELTS speaking practice tests and model answers to help you prepare thoroughly.

kiran-makkar-final-may-to-aug-2026.title: Kiran Makkar Final May to Aug 2026
kiran-makkar-final-may-to-aug-2026.description: Kiran Makkar IELTS speaking practice book with cue cards and sample answers for the May to August 2026 testing window.

mindset-for-ielts-1-students-book.title: Mindset For IELTS 1 Student's Book
mindset-for-ielts-1-students-book.description: Official Cambridge coursebook for IELTS. Mindset Level 1 targets students aiming for a Band 5.5, with exam practice and strategy keys.

mindset-for-ielts-foundation.title: Mindset For IELTS Foundation
mindset-for-ielts-foundation.description: Cambridge Mindset For IELTS Foundation Student's Book. Designed to prepare students who are starting their IELTS journey.

mindset-for-ielts-level-2.title: Mindset for IELTS Level 2
mindset-for-ielts-level-2.description: Cambridge Mindset For IELTS Level 2 coursebook, targeting students aiming for Band 6.5.

reading-practice-test-by-british-council.title: Reading Practice Test by British Council
reading-practice-test-by-british-council.description: Official British Council IELTS Reading Practice Tests. Practice with sample reading tasks to improve your comprehension and speed.

the-official-cambridge-guide-to-ielts.title: The Official Cambridge Guide to IELTS
the-official-cambridge-guide-to-ielts.description: The definitive guide to IELTS from the makers of the test. Provides comprehensive coverage of both the Academic and General Training modules.
